title: Lunit CTO: Medical AI Platform Built With Microsoft to Launch in Q2, Drive Revenue
description: Lunit CTO Yoo Sung-won says the medical AI platform co-developed with Microsoft will launch in Q2 2025, with advance payments and milestone revenue expected this year. The FMS solution enables hospital-tailored AI fine-tuning.

title: Mark Cuban Sounds Fresh AI Risk Alarm for Corporate America’s Boardrooms as CEOs Face a Market Trap
description: Billionaire investor Mark Cuban has thrown fresh light on what may be one of the defining risks facing large public companies. His assessment borders on corporate concern about whether to dismantle legacy business models in order to become AI-native, or risk being overtaken by a new generation of AI-first challengers. title: Samsung Beats High Estimates After AI Chip Sales Defy War Fears
description: (Bloomberg) -- Samsung Electronics Co. earned a far stronger-than-expected eight-fold leap in quarterly profit, underscoring robust demand for AI memory...

title: The AI Job Apocalypse That Wasn’t: Why Silicon Valley’s Darkest Predictions Keep Missing the Mark
description: Silicon Valley predicted AI would trigger mass unemployment within years. The labor market has refused to comply. Adoption is slower, the technology less reliable, and workers more adaptable than forecasters assumed — raising hard questions about who the apocalypse narrative really served.
